era_context: Egypt's Old Kingdom, Dynasty IV, Khafre's reign (c. 2558–2532 BCE). Mesopotamia in Early Dynastic III period. Indus Valley Civilisation in mature phase. Bronze Age in full development across Eurasia.
geographic_coverage_gaps: Most of the Pacific and Oceania
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified; no specific events are attested for this year.
historiographic_note: Like 2523 BCE, this year has no documented specific events in surviving historical records. The silence reflects the general sparsity of year-by-year documentation from the mid-third millennium BCE, even for literate civilisations. Administrative records, if they existed, have not survived or have not been recovered.
